programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The team and Assistant District Attorney Valerie Hudson (ROSELYN SANCHEZ) work to put away a notorious gang member. Television host BILL O'REILLY criticizes the police department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Boston Homicide teams up with the FBI after a robbery, but FBI agent Anna Farrell (guest star TESSA THOMPSON) appears to have a complicated history with Detective Frost.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane brings Maura to her high school reunion, but one of her old classmates turns up dead on the football field. Korsak gets a visit from his ex-wife (LOLITA DAVIDOVICH).

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: The competitive dance world turns deadly when the mother of a star performer is stabbed at a competition. Korsak's stepson is accused of shooting a cop. LOLITA DAVIDOVICH returns.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Arson or accident? Plus, FBI Agent Gabriel Dean (BILLY BURKE) hopes to rekindle his relationship with Jane, and JACQUELINE BISSETT appears as Maura's mother, Constance Isles.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Jane and Maura's friendship suffers following the shooting of Maura's biological father (JOHN DOMAN). BILLY BURKE, JACQUELINE BISSET, ED BEGLEY JR. appear.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Tensions continue to mount between Jane and Maura, causing those close to them to be caught in the middle. Frankie Sr. (CHAZZ PALMINTERI) returns with news that upsets Angela.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura meets a new guy (EDDIE CIBRIAN) in a very unusual way. Jane is filled with mixed emotions when someone from her past returns. CHRIS VANCE appears as Sgt. Major Casey Jones.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must find the clues when young female professionals dressed as dolls turn up dead on public transit. Jane also learns more about how Casey (CHRIS VANCE) was injured.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane looks for how Maura can meet her biological mother, Dr. Hope Davis (SHARON LAWRENCE). A nun from Jane and Frankie Jr.'s past returns. JENNY O'HARA guest stars.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: A wealthy octogenarian dies just months after marrying a young stripper. After his widow then dies of an overdose, attention turns towards the butler as a possible suspect.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: When Brenda's team investigates the murder of an Iranian businessman on the FBI's terrorist watch list, the LAPD and the FBI argue over jurisdiction -- and Fritz is in the middle.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Faulty evidence from a botched murder investigation three years ago is revealed after the body of woman believed to have been the victim of a death-row killer shows up in a morgue.

programme.title: The Closer
programme.desc: Brenda's team must investigate the murder of a high-profile Hollywood producer. Signs indicate the murder may have been committed by someone in the victim's family.

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: A Simple Plan
programme.desc: In a gym bag. That's how three men size up what they've found in the snowy Minnesota woods. They've come across a downed plane with a rotting corpse inside...and over $4 million stuffed inside a duffel bag. Finders, keepers? Maybe.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Life of Crime
programme.desc: A pampered housewife (Jennifer Aniston) is kidnapped by a pair of blundering ex-cons in an effort to extort money from her sleazy real-estate tycoon husband (Tim Robbins).

programme.title: Lucky Number Slevin
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Slevin into the middle of a war being plotted by two of the city's most rival crime bosses: The Rabbi and The Boss.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, a low level gangster named Jackie DiNorscio defends himself in court in what became the longest criminal trial in American judicial history.

programme.title: Best Men
programme.desc: Drew Barrymore, Luke Wilson and Sean Patrick Flannery star in this hilarious action-comedy wherein Drew Barrymore is a young woman determined to have the perfect wedding day, despite the fact that the groomsmen have decided to rob the local bank.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Jade
programme.desc: Corelli is up to his neck in a case that may lead where he doesn't want to go. Chazz Palminteri portrays Matt, an attorney and Corelli's longtime pal. Linda Fiorentino is Matt's wife Trina: a psychologist who's capable of anything, even murder.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Seduction, passion and power struggles unfold as the creators of Basic Instinct blow the lid off the seemingly glamorous world of Las Vegas showdancing in this controversial film that stars Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Blue Velvet
programme.desc: A sensual mystery thriller about strange happenings in a small North Carolina town. A college student stumbles across a bizarre mystery and wants to know more, perhaps too much more.

programme.title: Pi
programme.desc: A paranoid mathematician searches for a key number that will unlock the universal patterns found in nature. Pushed to his limits, he spirals between brilliance and obsession in this gripping, groundbreaking debut from Darren Aronofsky.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-travelling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Allied
programme.desc: When Intelligence Officer Max Vatan (Brad Pitt) learns his wife (Academy Award winner Marion Cotillard) may be conspiring with the enemy, he has only 72 hours to prove her innocence and save his family before he must do the unthinkable.

programme.title: Selma
programme.desc: From the Oscar-winning producers of 12 Years a Slave comes a powerful true story starring David Oyelewo and Oprah Winfrey. Facing violent opposition, Martin Luther King, Jr., led a historic march from Selma to Montgomery, changing the world forever.

programme.title: The Kite Runner
programme.desc: Amir is a young Afghani from a well-to-do Kabul family; his best friend Hassan is the son of a family servant. Together the two boys form a bond of friendship that breaks tragically on one fateful day.

programme.title: The Master (2012)
programme.desc: Haunted by his past, WW-II veteran and drifter Freddie Quell (Joaquin Phoenix) crosses paths with a mysterious movement led by The Master (Phillip Seymour Hoffman) and his wife (Amy Adams).

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: The murder of two teens along the River Thames leads to one of Britain's most massive manhunts and, ultimately, the capture of Alfred Whiteway.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1955, London nightclub manager Ruth Ellis confessed to the murder of her abusive lover, becoming the last woman to be executed in Britain.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Peter Manuel was a Scottish serial killer who killed at least eight people, but it was his mother's testimony that proved crucial to his case.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Chaco Canyon is an archaeological site rich with information, much of it still buried underground. Experts visit this remarkable settlement to piece together the mysteries of the Anasazi culture.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: What drove the hysteria of witchcraft trials? Historians, psychiatrists, and practicing witches seek out answers as we visit historic sites in Salem and Danvers.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Even after years of in-depth study, this crude yet stunning arrangement of stones known as Stonehenge in the English countryside continues to astound.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Tales of chivalry, romance and spiritual quest in one of England's most sacred sites: Glastonbury, The Isle of Avalon. We explore many questions surrounding this mysterious place.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Explore the mystery of the ancient sites of the beautiful Land's End Peninsula in Cornwall. How were these monuments built? Are they organized along mystic energy Ley Lines?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Chichen Itza is one of the most impressive of all the Mayan cities. Here we discover such mysterious structures as El Caracol, and the magnificent pyramid known as El Castillo.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Explore the mysterious landscapes of three of England's most extraordinary sites: Glastonbury, Land's End, and Stonehenge, all which are within several hundred miles of one another.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Deep in the Yucatan Peninsula, the pure Mayan city of Uxmal still stands. We visit the architecturally stunning Governor's Palace and the mysterious Pyramid of the Magician. What clues do they offer?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Here is the incredible story of Teotihuacan, and how 200,000 of its inhabitants "vanished" around the year 750 A.D. We explore the mesmerizing ruins and latest underground discoveries.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: With its array of archeo-astronomical alignments, America's Stonehenge is possibly the most important archaeological site in North America. A major question is: who built this, and when?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: A church or a cathedral has stood on the hill at Chartres in France for over 1500 years. Let's join Stacy Keach as he unravels the mysteries of this sacred site.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In 74 A.D., the fortress of Masada became the site of a bloodbath when 960 Jews committed suicide. Why did they do it? And why are some scientists now claiming it was actually a mass extermination?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: One mystical city, caught at the crossroads of three great religions, Jerusalem calls out across the ages. We'll travel to this timeless, sacred city and try to make sense of its mysteries.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In this special edition of Mysterious Places, we capture the magic and majesty of the most extraordinary pre-Columbian cities in Mexico's Yucatan peninsula: Chichen Itza and Uxmal.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the city of Santiago de Compostella lies a magnificent cathedral that serves as a sacred shrine. The cathedral is said to contain the mortal remains of St. James.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: The mysterious palace of Knossos, found in Crete, is the center of ancient Minoan ceremonial culture. Let's find out what really went on in the dark halls of the palace's underground labyrinth.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the year 79 AD, Mt. Vesuvius erupted, burying the thriving cities of Pompeii and Herculaneum. Rediscovered in 1748, these cities provide an extraordinary glimpse into the lives of ancient Romans.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Known in antiquity as the center of the world, Delphi is a sacred place where many gods were worshipped, foremost among them: Apollo, god of poetry, music, reason, and prophesy.

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: Who were the Etruscans? Where did they come from, and why were they different from other ancient societies? Most mysteriously, what caused their rapid fall from power and virtual disappearance?

programme.title: Mysterious Places with Stacy Keach
programme.desc: In the outback of Australia, one of the world's most bizarre rock formations is huge, imposing, and orange. To the aborigines, it is the part of the Earth from where all life sprung.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: Herbert Cukurs is an officer in the Latvian Air Force and his country's most celebrated pilot. After the Nazi invasion, he earns the name The Hangman of Riga after joining forces with the fascists.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: Christine (1983)
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Stephen King, CHRISTINE tells the story of a 1957 Plymouth that takes on human characteristics.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Based on the terrifying novel by Stephen King... After the Creed family moves to rural Maine, they stumble upon an ancient burial ground with sinister powers. When tragedy strikes, a perilous chain of events unleashes an unfathomable evil.

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: A police officer (Mary J. Blige) investigating a fellow officer's murder discovers an evil spirit targeting the cops in her unit, uncovering a sinister secret surrounding the shooting and cover-up of an unarmed youth in this intense action thriller.

programme.title: The Ruins
programme.desc: "The Ruins" follows a group of friends who become entangled in a struggle for survival after visiting a remote archaeological dig in the Mexican jungle where they discover something deadly living among the ruins.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ceiling mounted speakers disappear in plaster. The new HVAC system gets turned on. New garage doors are side mounted. The pool is lowered into place. The homeowner makes kitchen design choices.

programme.desc: Tom assists with interior window trim and custom storm windows. Richard checks out an electric meter and panels. Mark follows work on the hardscape. Kevin watches the assembly of a decorative shed.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Thomas Dulorme
programme.desc: On April 18th, 2015, Terence Crawford fought Thomas Dulorme for the WBO World Super Lightweight Title in Arlington, Texas. Putting on the pressure and showing his aggressive style, Crawford scored three knockdowns in the sixth round to get the TKO.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Viktor Postol
programme.desc: On July 23rd, 2016, Terence Crawford fought Viktor Postol for the WBO and WBC World Super Lightweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Scoring two knockdowns, Crawford dominated the fight, earning a much deserved unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Yuriorkis Gamboa
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2014, Terence Crawford fought Yuriorkis Gamboa for the WBO Lightweight Title at Century Link Center in Omaha. In Top Rank's 2014 Fight of the Year, Terence Crawford shined in front of his hometown, stopping Gamboa in the ninth round.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are escorting four prisoners - three men and one woman - to Leavenworth prison when a stranger begins following along behind asking to travel with the group for protection.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is summoned for help when the Pinto bank is robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh expects a $400 bounty for bringing in Daniel Trenner but finds his prisoner stolen from him by the sheriff.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Colonel Draco invites Paladin to investigate an "insurrection" over water rights. Paladin discovers that Draco was crippled eight months previously and wants revenge.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin comes to pay his respects to the mother of a Chinese man who is killed. She asks Paladin to meet a ship bound for China and see that her granddaughter is brought safely aboard.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is riding to meet a lovely French lady in Los Angelos. On the way he encounters an Indian maiden being attacked.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: After being tortured, Paladin, becomes a surrogate bull for a famous, but now insane bullfighter, Nino Ybarra..

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired by a man to deliver ten thousand dollars. Paladin has to sift through a numbr of suspects, including a band of gypsies and the men who found the body.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: New Mexico rancher Jesse Reade hires Paladin for $1,000 to bring back outlaw Dave Enderly, who has run off to Perdido, Mexico with Reade's daughter Nancy.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Manfred Holt breaks out of jail, killing two deputies. Is he on his way to kill the banker who testified against him, or to see his family for the last time?

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A sportsman sponsors a contest, betting that no one can elude his posse in the Mojave Desert. When Paladin shows up riding a camel, the man decides that the only way he can still win is to get rid of Paladin.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Paul Hayden is baited into a fight with three wild brothers, wounding one. When he later meets and falls in love with Karen Thomas, the sister of his three assailants, Hollister attempts to untangle the snarled affairs and prevent murder.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: In self-defense, Sheriff Hollister gunned down the son of the richest rancher in the territory, who offers a reward for Clay's death. A Marshal of a neighboring town lures the sheriff out of town so he, himself, can kill Clay and claim the reward.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher is killed and robbed of the ranch payroll. With only a horseshoe print to go by, Sheriff Hollister and Editor Claibourne set about trapping the culprit and end up meeting him in a furious fight. Alan Hale, Jr. guest stars.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sentenced to hang for a holdup murder, Reed Barker meets his fate at the gallows... but when the rope breaks when the trap is sprung, he is freed under Territorial Law. Sheriff Hollister and Editor Claibourne must unravel the mystery.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Angered over several recent mine disasters, Sheriff Hollister wages a campaign for mine safety legislation with the aid of Editor Claibourne of the Tombstone Epitaph. In the process, they uncover a clever ruse to discredit the safety campaign.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Adam Kirby witnesses a murder in the livery stable; then makes the mistake of 'shooting off his mouth about it, leading to the killer coming after him. Sheriff Hollister 'baits' a trap with Kirby and waits...to trap the killer and save Kirby.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a U.S. Marshal is ambushed while bringing in outlaw Kyle Dodge he turns his captive over to Sheriff Hollister just before he dies, with the cryptic warning 'Trust nobody.' Forewarned, the Sheriff forestalls a clever attempt to free Dodge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: In order to trap an outlaw gang, the Epitaph reports that a gang member is turning the state's witness. The outlaw dies of his wounds, but his death is kept secret. In a bold move, the gang kidnaps Claibourne and offers to exchange him for the outlaw.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Gore's ready to risk everything to take down Playmaker – including short-circuiting his brain!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Go With the Flow, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s sink or swim for Yuma when he puts his deck on the line and challenges Shark, the school bully, to a duel. Can Yuma beat the school’s #1 duelist, or will Yuma’s life points get reeled in by this ruthless opponent?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Go With the Flow, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s a dueling disaster for Yuma when a mysterious visitor from another galaxy suddenly appears, putting his duel with Shark in serious jeopardy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: In the End, Part 1
programme.desc: When the city is thrust into chaos after several of its computers become infected by a malicious virus, Yuma and Tori set out to find the culprit.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: In the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must outduel his math teacher before his life points are subtracted and the virus planted in the city’s computer system goes viral.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Flipping Out, Part 1
programme.desc: When fellow classmate Flip offers Yuma an Xyz Monster, Tori and Bronk warn Yuma to stay clear of this two-faced trouble maker.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Flipping Out, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat Flip or risk losing his Utopia card… and Astral forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Sparrow, Part 1
programme.desc: When Nelson Andrews, star of the hit TV series “The Sparrow,“ becomes possessed by a Number Card, Yuma challenges him to a duel, putting Astral’s safety on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Sparrow, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat The Sparrow and his powerful Galaxy Queen before Nelson and Astral disappear forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Feline Frenzy
programme.desc: In order to find his missing friend Tori, Yuma must face off against a feline fanatic who has the purr-fect answers to his every move.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shark Attack
programme.desc: Yuma discovers that Shark has started running with the wrong crowd and given up dueling. Can Yuma hook Shark back into battling, or are Shark's dueling days done forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Pack, Part 1
programme.desc: When Yuma learns that Shark is going to be set up to take the fall for stealing a priceless deck, Yuma challenges Shark’s thug friends to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Pack, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark’s tag team battle against The Pack reaches a fevery pitch, for if Yuma loses, he also loses Utopia!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Number Hunter, Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral face their toughest battle ever when they are forced to duel a mysterious individual who hunts Number Cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Number Hunter, Part 2
programme.desc: As the back-and-forth battle between Yuma and the mysterious Number Hunter continues, Yuma must duel like he’s never dueled before if he wants to save Astral, his Number Cards and his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Training Days, Part 1
programme.desc: The legendary Dark Magician and Blue-Eyes White Dragon come out of retirement when a wise old man named Master Roku challenges Yuma to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Training Days, Part 2
programme.desc: After challenging Master Roku’s former student to a duel, Yuma relies on his master’s teachings in order to defeat the evil Kaze and save the Duel Sanctuary’s Legendary Deck!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: It’s in the Cards, Part 1
programme.desc: When a mysterious fortune teller agrees to help out Yuma’s friends, they soon find themselves in a terrifying situation. Can Yuma rescue his pals, or will the all-knowing Fortuno see to it that Yuma fails?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: It’s in the Cards, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat the mysterious and all-knowing Fortuno if he wants to save his friends, his Number Card and his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Edge of the World
programme.desc: While on the way to School Spirit Day, Yuma realizes the Golden Key his father gave him is missing. As Astral and Yuma retrace his steps, Yuma shares the exciting story behind the Golden Key’s origins.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roots of the Problem
programme.desc: When Yuma gets into a fight with Bronk, their friendship is soon put to the ultimate test when an evil Number Card takes control of Yuma.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Battle With the Bot
programme.desc: Yuma befriends a broken Litterbot only to discover that it has been programmed to do the dirty work for a wanted jewel thief. Can Yuma put a stop to this thief’s thieving ways, or will Yuma’s newest friend trash his plan to stop him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Shark Hunter
programme.desc: Shark tries to stop Kite from stealing Yuma’s Golden Key by challenging him to a duel. Can Shark sink his teeth into Kite’s life points and save Yuma’s prized possession, or will Kite’s cunning skills sink any chance Shark has of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Hunting Down the Hunter, Part 1
programme.desc: With his Golden Key in Kite’s possession, Yuma must hunt down the Number Hunter if he ever wants to see Astral again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Hunting Down the Hunter, Part 2
programme.desc: While Yuma continues to search for Astral and the Golden Key, while Astral looks for a way to defeat Kite and save all his Number Cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: When an unexpected phenomenon stops time, Kite is able to gain the upper hand by tapping into Astral's memories and witnessing firsthand the battles that he and Yuma have fought together.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: Victorious: Sleepover at Sikowitz's
programme.desc: Sikowitz invites the gang to have a sleepover at his house in order to teach them a lesson in method acting.

programme.title: Victorious: The Wood
programme.desc: The kids are excited to hear that they'll be the stars of a new reality show being filmed at Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Trina and Robbie are forced to work at The Grub Truck after injuring Festus.

programme.title: Victorious: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: Victorious: Wok Star
programme.desc: Tori agrees to help Jade find a theater to perform a play Jade wrote. But when the sponsor demands changes that will ruin Jade's play, Tori has to make things right before opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Survival of the Hottest
programme.desc: A heat wave hits LA and the gang heads for the beach in Beck's RV. But once there, they find themselves trapped inside the RV as the temperature rises. Oblivious, Cat parties it up with some cute boys.

programme.title: Victorious: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed, leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat, but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck Falls for Tori
programme.desc: Tori auditions for a role in a movie. But after exaggerating on her resume, she gets hired as a stunt double. When Tori finds out her stunt is falling off a building, she's not sure she can do it.

programme.title: Victorious: Helen Back Again
programme.desc: When Principal Eikner leaves Hollywood Arts, the school hires a new principal who makes all the students re-audition in order to keep their spots. Who will get kicked out?

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Gets Stuck
programme.desc: Tori Gets Stuck: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy… Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: Victorious: Who Did it to Trina?
programme.desc: Trina stars in Tori's directorial debut, and there is a big accident on opening night. Lane wants to find out what went wrong. Everyone thinks it was an equipment malfunction, maybe it's sabotage.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: Victorious: A Christmas Tori
programme.desc: The kids have to find the perfect Secret Santa gifts for each other, because whoever gives the worst gift has to go door-to-door yodeling with Sikowitz!

programme.title: Victorious: The Breakfast Bunch
programme.desc: Tori and the gang are forced to spend a Saturday in detention after a lunch trip gone wrong. They have the whole day to learn about each other, find food, and try not to earn more detention.

programme.title: Victorious: The Worst Couple
programme.desc: Jade and Beck help Sinjin with his new game show, "The Worst Couple," but it puts their relationship to the test. Meanwhile, Tori breaks her precious Pear Phone.

programme.title: Victorious: Andre's Horrible Girl
programme.desc: Tori notices some changes in her friend Andre, whose girlfriend seems to be overbearing and controlling. Meanwhile, Jade and Cat try to earn easy money dog-sitting in Beverly Hills.
